tasks.name: Pilot H-SF1-L4: Layer 4 Sensitivity Floor Quadrant Test
tasks.description: Test Sensitivity Floor hypothesis at layer 4 (non-saturated). Apply Chanin absorption protocol + Tian sensitivity protocol on 50 features. Compute quadrant classification and U-shape fit. Layer 4 showed UAS std=0.48 in iter_010 vs layer 8 std=0.0.

visualizations.description: Layer 4 absorption vs sensitivity scatter with quadrant coloring
U-shape fit: mean sensitivity per absorption bin

tasks.name: Pilot H-Q4-PARADOX: Q4 Paradox Mechanism Investigation
tasks.description: Investigate WHY Q4 features (10236, 6768) are absorbed but high-sensitivity. Compute specificity metrics: decoder cosine similarity to neighbors, specificity scores. Compare to Q1 features (absorbed + low-sensitivity). Test if Q4 uses a different absorption mechanism.

pilot.pass_criteria: Q4 specificity differs from Q1 specificity (p < 0.05)

visualizations.description: Specificity scores: Q4 vs Q1 vs Q3 features

tasks.name: Pilot H-STEER: Steering Protocol Debug
tasks.description: Debug steering protocol to get non-zero effects. iter_010 found all steering effects = 0.0. Test beta in {5, 10, 20}, verify baseline accuracy changes. Use layer 4 features with varying sensitivity scores.

pilot.pass_criteria: At least 1 feature shows steering effect != 0 at any beta

visualizations.description: Steering effect vs beta for different sensitivity features

shared_resources.name: gpt2-small-res-jb
shared_resources.notes: Layer 4 primary, layer 8 for Q4 comparison

shared_resources.name: iter_010_q4_features
shared_resources.notes: Features 10236, 6768 are Q4 features from iter_010

pilot_plan.note: CRITICAL: Layer 4 is the only non-saturated layer (UAS std=0.48 vs layer 8 std=0.0). pilot_layer4_sf1_quadrants is the PRIMARY experiment - tests SF at layer 4. pilot_q4_paradox_investigation addresses the critical paradox from iter_010. pilot_steering_debug fixes a broken protocol.
